arts.ttl: Team News: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Fulham injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Premier League clash between Wolverhampton Wanderers and Fulham.

Wolves made it three wins from their last four matches in all competitions with the narrow 1-0 victory at Bournemouth on Saturday. Vitor Pereira's side have opened up a five-point gap to the Premier ...

arts.ttl: Fulham boss Silva gives injury update ahead of Wolves clash
arts.sum: Fulham are assessing Emile Smith Rowe and Tom Cairney ahead of Tuesday’s away match against Wolves. Both players were substituted during the second half of Saturday’s 2-0 home defeat by Crystal Palace after picking up knocks. But both appear to have a chance of featuring at Wolves, according to boss Marco Silva. “We’re going to […] The post Fulham boss Silva gives injury update ahead of Wolves clash appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha gives Wolves team-mate answer he needs during toughest season of career
arts.sum: Wolves took a huge step towards safety in the Premier League with a 1-0 win over Bournemouth on Saturday, with star forward Matheus Cunha notching for the fourth straight game
